incorrects.description: Student set Team A bar to wrong height on first attempt

steps.text: Check the data table. Team A scored 45 points.

incorrects.description: Student set Team A bar to wrong height on second attempt

params.description: Team A column highlighted. Ghost gridlines pulse at 40 and 50.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. 45 is halfway between 40 and 50. Use the gridlines to find the middle.

incorrects.description: Student set Team A bar to wrong height three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets Team A bar to 45, halfway between gridlines at 40 and 50.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. I look at the data table: Team A scored 45. Now I find 40 and 50 on the axis. 45 is right in the middle, halfway between those two lines. I set the bar there.
